loading.description: Minimum for first spin — UI controls, reel land, payline, rollup

main.description: Base game — symbols, big win, anticipation, rollups. Loaded on first spin.

bonus.description: All bonus modes (free spins, hold & win, picker) + transitions. Loaded on scatter/trigger.

streaming.description: Background music — built as individual M4A, manifest gets loadType 'S'. deployStreaming.js generates BGMStreamingInit.ts that creates HTML5 Audio Howl instances (~3 MB RAM instead of ~40 MB per track). Auto-patches game main.ts — zero developer involvement.
